brand.name: wellcore
brand.tagline: Pressure into clarity. One breath at a time.

welcome.subtitle: Evidence-led HBOT support — built on FDA Aug 2025 guidance.
welcome.alreadyMember: Already a member? Apple Sign-In recovers your session.

goals.title: What brings you to HBOT?
goals.subtitle: Pick up to 5. We'll match protocols + check-ins to these.
goals.medicalDisclaimer: Some goals describe medical conditions. We are not a medical service — coordinate with your clinician.

chamber.title: Which chamber will you use?
chamber.subtitle: This drives protocol matching and safety guidance.

fireSafety.title: Fire safety
fireSafety.subtitle: Per FDA Aug 2025 guidance — please read fully.
fireSafety.ack: I have read and understood the fire safety guidance.
fireSafety.scrollHint: Scroll to the end to acknowledge.

disclaimer.title: Wellcore is not a medical service
disclaimer.body: Wellcore is a wellness companion. We do not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always coordinate with your clinician.

pregnancy.title: Are you pregnant?
pregnancy.description: Pregnancy is a contraindication to HBOT.

pneumothorax.title: Untreated pneumothorax?
pneumothorax.description: Untreated pneumothorax is an absolute contraindication.
pneumothorax.hardStopRationale: Untreated pneumothorax is an absolute contraindication to HBOT.

ear_surgery.title: Recent ear surgery / unable to equalize?
ear_surgery.description: Inability to equalize middle ear pressure is a hard contraindication.
ear_surgery.hardStopRationale: Equalization issues require clearance before HBOT.

active_malignancy.title: Active malignancy or current chemotherapy?
active_malignancy.description: Active cancer or concurrent chemotherapy requires oncology clearance.

severe_copd.title: Severe COPD with CO2 retention?
severe_copd.description: CO2 retention is a hard contraindication.
severe_copd.hardStopRationale: Severe COPD with CO2 retention contraindicates HBOT.

claustrophobia.title: Significant claustrophobia?
claustrophobia.description: We can adjust the experience for comfort.
claustrophobia.softWarning: We'll adjust pacing and offer breathing aids.

recent_surgery.title: Recent surgery or wound healing?
recent_surgery.description: Coordinate with your clinician — HBOT can support wound healing under supervision.
recent_surgery.softWarning: Coordinate with your clinician before continuing.

phq9_item9.title: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you had thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself in some way?

consent.title: Consent
consent.subtitle: Per US privacy laws (CCPA, MHMDA, MODPA).
consent.terms: I accept the Terms of Service
consent.ccpa_sale: Do NOT sell or share my personal information (CCPA opt-out)
consent.mhmda: I consent to processing of my consumer health data (MHMDA / Washington)
consent.modpa: I consent to processing of my consumer health data (MODPA / Maryland)

locale.title: Language
locale.subtitle: You can change this any time in Settings.

preview.title: Pre-session check-ins
preview.subtitle: Before each session, we'll ask 4 short questions (PROMIS-aligned). 30 seconds.

hardStop.title: HBOT may not be right for you
hardStop.subtitle: Based on your answers, we recommend pausing and coordinating with your clinician.
